summary: A recorded 'Jesse Watters Primetime' segment on Fox News with the chyron 'NO MORE FREE HOUSING FOR MIGRANTS,' featuring host Jesse Watters in studio plus a clip of Secretary Noem and HUD Secretary Turner signing a housing partnership. Graphics include the show's 'America's Golden Age' and 'Deranged Dems' bumper cards. This is a straight cable-news talk segment, not a music-driven or genre-styled production, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: NO MORE FREE HOUSING FOR MIGRANTS
THE LEFT LOVES DEFENDING MIGRANT GANGBANGERS
